metadata.title: Nailing a Quick Double Kill with Tight Peeks and Steady Aim in VALORANT
metadata.description:
Watch how sharp peeks and calm aim secure a clean double kill in this VALORANT clip. Timing and positioning come together to win the round fast. What’s your favorite clutch angle?

Share your best plays below!

Got a clutch moment? Drop it in the comments!

#shorts #valorant #gaming #fps #clutch
